title: Authentication System and User Management
description: Implement complete authentication flow using Supabase Auth including email/password registration, login, logout, and session management. Build the Settings page for account management (update email, password, delete account). Create auth middleware for protecting routes and API endpoints. Implement user creation hook that creates corresponding profile record in Users table on signup. Build login/register UI pages with form validation and error handling. Handle auth state globally via React context or similar pattern.
